title: arctotis glandulosa
intro: Arctotis glandulosa, also known as the Cape daisy, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Arctotis glandulosa include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Arctotis glandulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
